enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder on February 3, 2017, recounting his failed attempt to find specific light bulb covers at local stores (including Home Depot) and settling for ordering them online. The bulk of the video covers his current project: building a template for a book called 'Livi' on his website using his 'rainbow christian format,' which he needs in place before he can start his planned TV show using a green screen.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Glad he stocked up in time; relieved to have secured the old technology before stores stopped carrying it
Should have built a reusable template from the start instead of building each book manually; now correcting that
Almost ready to start but the website with the storyline has to come first; optimistic he can finish the Livi template within days

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Last night I went to sleep at around 1:30 a.m. because I was really tired.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I thought I slept in today but I think I got an okay amount of sleep.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went to the hardware store to get lighting stuff but they only had one of the seven lamp covers I needed.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I still needed another light itself, so I went to Home Depot but they didn't have it at all.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I called around and found someone selling the lights online, so I ordered six more.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm glad I got the old technology lights before they're completely phased out for LED lights.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll be able to put up my lights today, but I haven't yet because I was working on another project.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My project for the day is putting up a living section on my website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Yesterday I figured out the green screen and wanted to start my TV show.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I have everything ready for the TV show, including the lights and coat stands, but I need the storyline.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I need the storyline on my website because that's the only way I know how to look at books, using my rainbow Christian format.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm currently putting up 'Livi' on my website, which is a pretty big book with 100 pages and 37 books, each with about 60 chapters.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm making a template for 'Livi' now because I never made one before and just built the books without one.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Once the template is done, I'll put it on my website so others can download it and I can fill in the other books.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm building the template for 'Livi' now and will copy it to use as a template for other books.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think I can finish 'Livi' in a couple of days or over the weekend if I focus on it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I might need to do a little bit of Googling, but I'm pretty much ready to finish 'Livi'.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I won't have the green screen ready today because it's my vlog day, but maybe by tomorrow.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I had the green screen ready to go, but it's not set up for today's vlog.
